description:
Offered: every semester
Teacher candidates complete the practicum five days weekly in an educational setting under the direction of a supervising practitioner who is certified in the area of licensure sought by the candidate and under the guidance of the university supervisor. Candidates teach students with severe disabilities.
Prerequisite(s): Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review
Corequisite(s): EDUC 4550
prerequisites: Successful Passage of Stage Two Education Unit Review
